feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Different Town
entry.summary:
Author: Kiray

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,064Chapters: 3/39Kudos: 4

Summary: Post-military life as a single father in the city was demanding on a good day. When Eddie realised that his was no longer sustainable, he decided to switch gears completely. Had he ever imagined Christopher and himself in a place like Crescent Falls? Absolutely not. Yet, rediscovering his skills from long before the army, working as a ranch hand for someone called Bobby and meeting a guy named Buck... All of it sent him on a journey, that would end up rattling every aspect of his life. OR the one in which Eddie (closed off, repressed and zeroed in), gives up city life for a ranch in the middle of nowhere to provide for his son and finds way more than he was looking for.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I Choose You (A 9-1-1 x Pokemon Crossover)
entry.summary:
Author: Unhingedoveractivemuse

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,448Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 178

Summary: Evan Buckley loves Pokémon. From his morning and early afternoons chasing and playing with the family Eevee and the neighbor's Skitty to cuddling with the family Eevee and Maddie's as his sister reads him a bedtime story, the time spent with the amazing creatures are the highlights of his day. Those moments are when he stops feeling lonely. So when, one day, he comes face to face with a Growlithe and is told it's going to be his Pokémon, all his wishes seem to have come true in an instant.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

Author: Buckedie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,026Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

entry.title: Lost and Found-The TRUE story about Evan Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: Bellaromanza

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 125,709Chapters: 23/23Kudos: 319

Summary: Buck always felt like he didn't belong.Little did he know he belonged to two dynasties, and the truth will change his life in the best of ways.Also, Christopher is the best part of Eddie's mess.

entry.title: (not my) fucking probie
entry.summary:
Author: oneofthesirens

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,468Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 4

Summary: Buckley tilts his chin up; defiant, unimpressed. And yet… Eddie’s heart tumbles in his chest. He feels the uneven pitter-patter against his rib cage, the hot flush of desire that skirts up his spine. Buckley raises his eyebrow and it’s a challenge. Something unspoken, tenuous. Eddie can feel the tendrils of lust unfurling to rest heavy through his limbs. It’s just the sound of their breathing in the bunk room. Eddie’s breaths are quick, half-stolen. His chest feels too tight at the proximity of Buckley’s lips to his own. “What’s your issue, Diaz?” Buckley says. “You don’t like me — okay, sure. But I’m not sure what I’ve done to make you dislike me this much. I’m not a dog you need to lecture.” There’s still enough coherence in his brain that Eddie could pull together an argument — justify it someway as loyalty to Bobby, as concern for the team. He could shake off the lust that weighs his body down like lead and step away from Buckley, give him a verbal dressing down that has the probie sulking for the rest of the afternoon. [or: Eddie’s team gets a new probie.]

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Slow Burn

entry.title: Running Back Home
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,390Chapters: 1/12Kudos: 108

Summary: Buck is no stranger to being alone. He spent years fending for himself after leaving the house he grew up in, and even the years before that, he didn’t really have anyone.He thought he had found a family with the 118. He had a captain he came to see as a father, found a mother in Athena and a wider family from his coworkers and theirs. Buck even thought he might have a chance at something more with the man who was his best friend and his son. He should have known better. -+- A post-lawsuit fic (kind of) where Buck leaves and never really had any intention of coming back. The universe has different plans for him though.

entry.summary:
Author: bxrchie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,012Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: And then there was Eddie. Eddie from El Paso, Texas and he doesn’t even know his last name or what he does for work and yet he wants more. He’s never wanted to know more about anyone as bad as he wants to know about Eddie right now.orwhat if Buck and Eddie had met before they started working together?

entry.title: 'Cause You Love Somebody
entry.summary:
Author: love_me_anyway_118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,792Chapters: 17/17Kudos: 131

Summary: Buck would do anything for Theo, especially adopting him. It wasn't an easy path but Buck was willing. The problem was that Theo had been thorough a lot in a short amount of time and he needed stability in his life right now, which meant two parents and preferably a kid.That wasn't Bucks strong suit.But it was Eddie's.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,487Chapters: 18/24Kudos: 553

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: Karma.
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,101Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 69

Summary: Buck’s voice cuts gently through the silence. “Seriously, man. You okay?” Eddie swallows. The honest answer feels lodged somewhere behind his ribs, terrifying and enormous. No, actually. I think I’m in love with you and it’s ruining my entire life. Instead he says, “Just thinking.”

entry.title: more than an afterthought
entry.summary:
Author: effervescentwolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,989Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 208

Summary: “How do people have sex when they have kids?” Buck continues, knowing he’s whining a little bit, but he’s pent up, and Theo came into his life without warning so he didn’t have time to mentally prepare for everything it would entail. Namely, what it would mean for Buck’s sex life.Eddie’s face is kind of red, but he says, in that matter of fact way he always does, “Theo’s asleep right now.”

entry.title: A Chance... Or Two?
entry.summary:
Author: Lanam_1313

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,070Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: A story in which Buck met Eddie in Peru while Buck was a bartender and Eddie was a soldier trying to forget he had a wife and a son at home; forget he did…They never contact each other again… Until a fateful day where Eddie happens to join the 118. Though in Peru Eddie was just Edmundo, trying to separate his soldier life and civilian life as much as possible. And Buck? Buck was still Evan back then.The second time they meet it is basically a fresh start; how will they take it?

entry.title: Hold onto me, I’m a little unsteady
entry.summary:
Author: Unknownpizza

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,286Chapters: 20/20Kudos: 106

Summary: “I’m scared Eddie…” “What are you scared of, Evan?” Eddie’s voice cracked, because he *knew*…and nothing he could ever do would change what happened. “…I’m scared of what I m-might remember…and I don’t want it to h-hurt again…” “I don’t want it to hurt you again either…I’m sorry…”

entry.title: Leaving and Growing Up
entry.summary:
Author: ratking_withnotail

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 379,303Chapters: 29/31Kudos: 1,325

Summary: Percy Jackson was excited—genuinely excited—for the first time in what felt like years. A new city. A new name. A new face, even. The golden hair, the pale blue eyes, the tattoos that traced his skin like constellations—none of it screamed “Percy Jackson” anymore. He was Evan Buckley now, or just Buck, depending on who asked. He’d keep busy—physically exhausted, mentally occupied, emotionally detached. That was the key. No attachments. No friendships. No relationships. No vulnerability. He’d learned the hard way that getting close to people only ended in pain. Either they died, betrayed him, or saw the legend behind the name and stopped seeing him altogether. Unfortunately, he hadn’t planned on the 118.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: My life or Our Life?
entry.summary:
Author: Viperthesniperagent

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,215Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 28

entry.title: The Deal That Built a Family / Trust Me With Him
entry.summary:
Author: villayuly1987

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,084Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 62

Summary: It's not your typical Buddie fic. Eddie becomes a father through surrogacy.He is a Nurse. He is gayHe become Friends with the Buckleys.He bonds instantly with Evan Buckley.When Chris is born, Eddie and Buck grow closer.  Only for their friendship to shatter when Buck becomes engaged,and Eddie discovers how dangerous Tommy is with Buck when things don't go his way Multiple events are happeningThat will only. Proof that they are meant to be together. As you all know, I am not a Tommy Kinard fan The story opens up 5 months into the surrogacy process

entry.title: I'll bring you home
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,929Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 78

Summary: After a tragic accident leaves Connor and Kameron’s son orphaned, Buck struggles with what role he’s supposed to play in Theo’s life — and whether someone like him could ever be enough for a child. Before he and Eddie can figure any of that out, the 118 is called to an active hostage situation at a Los Angeles junior high school. What starts as another terrifying call quickly turns into every firefighter’s nightmare.
